text.title: Google Shopping Ads Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real google-shopping-ads engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: 60% of products disapproved; spend concentrated on 5 SKUs; missed inventory.
antipattern.fix: Audit + fix titles / GTIN / images; resubmit; recheck.

antipattern.symptom: One Shopping campaign covers all inventory; high-margin SKUs under-bid.
antipattern.fix: Split into priority tiers with distinct ROAS targets.

antipattern.symptom: Spend through 'free X' / 'used X' / 'X jobs' queries.
antipattern.root-cause: Negatives not applied because Shopping does not 'bid' on keywords.
antipattern.fix: Apply negative-keyword list to Shopping campaigns; review weekly.
